content.en:
Fighting!

It's a fight everywhere!

The Eternal Universe and the Cangyu Universe were completely in chaos, this was a situation that the powerhouses of the two universes did not expect, and even Ye Tian did not expect it.

Dual-universe fusion is taboo in chaos, so even the Oxen don't know the details of dual-universe fusion, only general information.

Therefore, Ye Tian only knew that the probability of the fusion of the two universes was very low, but he did not know that the dimensional world would merge with the main world, allowing the universe to continue to expand.

If he knew this, he would definitely be more prepared.

In the territory of the human race, a large number of powerful creatures appeared, and the earth lords of the human race took action one after another to fight with these earth lords, and Ye Tian also personally suppressed them.

With Ye Tian's speed, the rescue was very fast, and any powerful Earth Venerable-level creature would not be able to compete with him, and he would be easily killed in an instant.

Divine creatures, on the other hand, are not so common, at least not yet.

Therefore, this turmoil is only a minor problem for the Terrans, but there are still many Terran planets that have not had time to rescue and have been destroyed.

But in comparison, the loss of the human race is insignificant, the loss of the alliance of all races is very large, the territory of the alliance of all races is too large, although there are many earth honors, but they can't be rescued at all.

Countless star fields were destroyed, a large number of weak Earth Lords were killed, and there were also members of the Tibetan God Organization secretly causing trouble, resulting in too great losses for the Ten Thousand Races Alliance.

However, the Alliance of All Races still has some background and barely survived.

But those weak middle races and high races in the universe have suffered, and there is no earth lord above five stars in charge, and once they are unlucky enough to encounter some powerful dimensional worlds, they are almost unable to compete.

In a single day, more than 100,000 races were wiped out.

In just a few days, the population of the entire universe has plummeted by more than 50%.

It's a disaster!

It is a disaster for the fusion of the main world of the universe and the dimensional world, but it is also an opportunity, and whoever can survive the strong will improve their strength very quickly.

And the dual universe will also usher in a new era!

......

Extracosmic.

Figures emerged one after another, and they looked at the expanding universe and discussed it one by one.

"Chaotic Sea True Monarch, the fusion of the Eternal Universe and the Cangyu Universe has entered the second stage, and the two universes are about to usher in a prosperous era!"

A young man in gray armor said with a smile.

He is one of the ten true monarchs of the Tibetan God Organization - the Gray Armor True Monarch.

In the chaos, the strong people of the Heavenly Mandate are called the Heavenly Monarchs, and the strong people of the True Spirit Realm are called the True Monarchs, and the Tibetan God Organization is just a small force, there are only about hundreds of True Monarchs, and the top ten of them are called the Ten True Monarchs, which are the real high-level of the Tibetan God Organization.

And the True Monarch of the Troubled Sea is the true person in charge of the Dual Universe Transcendence Project, and he is also the Venerable in the mouths of those people.

"Gray Armor True Monarch, this time our Hidden God Organization has paid too much for this plan, and even our genius juniors have invested in it, if a few transcendents are not born, it will be a loss. We can't be promoted to become the powerhouses of the Great Dao, so we can only rely on the juniors. If a few transcendents are born, and with our cultivation, we are expected to become powerhouses in the Great Dao realm, then our Tibetan God Organization is enough to become one of the real great forces. Troubled Sea True Monarch said solemnly.

"It's difficult, although the strength of those juniors has improved quickly in such a prosperous universe, after all, they want to re-understand the rules of the universe, and with their background in the outside world, they can be promoted to a one-star god general at most, and they need to rely on themselves later. The three-star god general can be transcended with the identity of the anti-heaven person, but the final transcendent thunder tribulation is too terrifying, unless it is a three-star god general who has a life-defying thing to be able to survive, otherwise at least the strength of the four-star god general needs to be insured!"

Gray Armor True Monarch frowned.

There are two kinds of transcendents, one is the Yuntan Heavenly Monarch, who uses some treasures to forcibly detach, which is suitable for non-anti-heavens, but the Tibetan God Organization can't take out such treasures.

The second is the orthodox route of the Rebel against the sky, all the way up against the sky, but every time the realm of the big breakthrough needs to cross the thunder tribulation, and the transcendent thunder tribulation is the most terrifying, and the three-star god will almost definitely die.

Regarding this point, the Tibetan God Organization has never told those Earth Lords of the Dual Universe at all, and those Earth Lords may still think that as long as they reach the three-star God General level, they can transcend it.

Of course.

Non-anti-heaven people can also be expected to transcend without the help of transcendent treasures, but at least they need the strength of a six-star god general, and this difficulty is even greater.

Because if you are not a person who is against the sky, your foundation is not solid, and your potential is limited, how difficult it will be to be promoted to a six-star god!

Because of this, all the reincarnated beings of the Tibetan God Organization are anti-heavens, and they only need to reach the four-star god general to transcend and leave.

But there is not much time now, and it must be transcended in tens of millions of years, which is a bit difficult.

There are so many reincarnateds, it is estimated that only a few will be able to transcend at most, and the others are all foils!

It can even be said that those reincarnated people don't know the difficulty of detachment, and they think that entering the dual universe this time will give birth to a large number of transcendental beings.

If the specific proportions are stated, I am afraid that few gods will dare to be reborn into the universe.

After all, in the chaos, they can still become the powerhouses of the Heavenly Mandate Realm, even if they cannot be promoted to the True Spirit Realm in the future, but the lifespan of the Heavenly Mandate Realm is also very long, at least dozens of cosmic eras.

After such a long time, many Heavenly Destiny Realm powerhouses have been satisfied, and there is no need to take the path of death.

Besides, there are countless opportunities for chaos, and there is no need to be a detached.

But for the sake of this plan, the Tibetan God Organization concealed some things.

"Don't talk about this, if they can transcend and return, then naturally they won't care about what we are hiding, if they can't transcend, then they will die in the universe!"

The true monarch of the chaotic sea.

The Gray Armor True Monarch nodded, and immediately stopped thinking about these little things.

Suddenly, he said again: "Chaotic Sea True Monarch, the big forces in some nearby territories seem to have known about the affairs of the Twin Universes, and they seem to want to intervene as well, if a Great Dao powerhouse intervenes, even if the Dao powerhouse is weak, we can't compete with it." "

"It doesn't matter, the dual universes have already begun to merge, and they can't let people reincarnate in it anymore, unless those Dao powerhouses are willing to pay a huge price, but then it's not worth it. I estimate that even if these Dao powerhouses want to participate, they will at most find some disciples or win over some gods within the dual universe, but they are not as fully prepared as us, and the biggest benefit is still us. "The true monarch of the troubled sea.

"If the two universes merge into a big universe, then can we keep a big universe?"

Gray Armor True Monarch asked.

"Great Universe!" Ranhai Zhenjun laughed and said, "How low is that probability, we are not ready to cultivate a great universe at all." However, we will definitely not be able to keep it if we are really lucky enough to cultivate a big universe, but we can cooperate with those big forces to obtain more benefits. Besides, we don't have no backers, and those big forces don't dare to destroy us. "

"Hmm!"

The Gray Armor True Monarch also recognized the words of the Chaotic Sea True Monarch, although the Tibetan God Organization did not have a powerhouse in the Great Dao realm, their leader, the Tibetan God True Monarch who had been in retreat, was a registered disciple of a strong man in the Dao!

Even if the relationship is not very deep, but if you have a little relationship with the strong man of the Cooperative Dao, the other forces will not dare to destroy the Tibetan God Organization, and no one knows if the strong man of the Cooperative Way will be angry.
